title: Saptapadi
desc: Maitri and Aravind struggle with their personal lives, one caught in an unhappy marriage, the other under the weight of his step-family. Their lives change when they find each other.

title: Varasuralu
desc: A once-united family falls apart due to ambition and blame. However, years later, a determined daughter sets out to fulfill a promise to bring her loved ones back together.

title: Guppedantha Manasu
desc: An academically gifted girl is forced by her father to get married and give up on her dreams of having a successful life.

title: Aadivaram Star Maa Parivaram - Star Wars
desc: Several well-known television actors compete against each other in various fun-filled activities in a bid to emerge victorious.

title: Chinni
desc: Born and raised in prison for 10 years, Chinni, a young girl, must overcome challenges of the outside world after she is separated from her mother.

title: Nindu Manasulu
desc: Two individuals, Prerana and Siddharth, are traumatised by their past. Eventually, they cross paths, but will their love for each other help them rediscover themselves?

title: Nuvvu Leka Nenu Lenu
desc: A sudden catastrophe leads Radha into a functional marriage with Vikram. Their unconventional partnership is tested as they strive to build a foundation of support and unexpected bond.

title: Illu Illalu Pillalu
desc: In a close-knit family, Ramaraju faces unexpected challenges as his children clash with adversaries. Their unbreakable bond is tested as they navigate through life's twists and turns together.

title: Karthika Deepam-Nava Vasantham
desc: Karthik, a cardiologist, and his wife Deepa, a cook, navigate through various inadvertent circumstances as they strive to look after their children.

title: Intinti Ramayanam
desc: Avani and her husband Akshay navigate the struggles of living in a tight family, navigating the problems that arise from living together.

title: Gunde Ninda Gudigantalu
desc: When Meena, a flower seller at a temple and Balu, a cab driver, cross paths in life, they are faced with the decision to keep their love intact despite indulging in two different occupations.

title: Podarillu
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Mad For Each Other
desc: The host presents couples with eccentric challenges and surprising twists, testing their bonds as they compete for a grand prize.

title: Skanda
desc: A skilled martial artist's life changes when a secret agency recruits him to stop terrorists. He faces a dangerous mission that will test his abilities and courage beyond anything he is known.

title: Boss I love you
desc: Anuradha, a social worker, meets Gopal Khanna, who hires her as his personal secretary. She falls in love with him, but discovers that he is still in love with his dead wife.

title: Arjun
desc: Arjun steps in to protect his twin sister when her in-laws attempt to kill her.

title: Dhurandar
desc: The presenter discusses the film 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' in terms of its OTT and television release and also talks about its teaser.
